headline: HP Shares Are Down 31% Over the Past Year Despite a Revenue Beat
summary: HP Inc (NYSE:HPQ) beat Q1 FY2026 estimates on both the top and bottom lines, yet shares have lost 31% over the past year and trade near their 52-week low of $17.56. Meanwhile, Reddit sentiment scores have settled in the 22-28 range, with 70% of records classified as bearish. AI PC momentum is real, but memory ...
